creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Aloha Tassilo,

There is the same problem, please just rebuild and send to me again.

Error:
araujo@ponderosa new> sh 132329 
c - psptoolchain-binutils
x - psptoolchain-binutils/distinfo
x - psptoolchain-binutils/Makefile
x - psptoolchain-binutils/pkg-descr
c - psptoolchain-binutils/files
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-bfd-cpu-mips.c
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-bfd-Makefile.am
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-bfd-version.h
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-config.sub
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-configure
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-gas-configure
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-include-bin-bugs.h
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-include-elf-mips.h
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-include-opcode-vfpu.h
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-ld-Makefile.am
x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-ld-Makefile.in

x - psptoolchain-binutils/files/patch-gas-configure.in

132329: 3207: Syntax error: Illegal eof marker for << redirection


Best Regards,
-- 
Marcelo Araujo
araujo@FreeBSD.org
http://www.FreeBSD.org
If at first you don't succeed,
blame it on your supervisor.
